headline: Allstate announces quarterly dividend payable Oct. 1, 2026
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) announced today its board of directors approved a quarterly dividend of $1.08 on each outstanding share of the corporation's common stock to be payable in cash on Oct. 1, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on Aug. 31, 2026.

headline: Travelers' Automobile and Homeowners Insurance Business Drives Growth

headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Oil Futures Surge On Strikes
summary: U.S. strikes Iran, oil responds. Oklahoma targets Allstate's claims practices. Streaming's biggest players are chasing the World Cup.
